changelog:
v1.1.8 (2026-05-12)

[Subtitles] Fix font_size so large subtitle sizes apply correctly instead of being clamped on 720p videos.
[Subtitles] Make subtitle text bold with stronger outline and soft shadow for readability.
[Settings] Simplify subtitle settings by hiding advanced border, shadow, box, speaker-side, and margin controls.

Recommended subtitle font size for 1280x720: 42-52.
